Class SimpleNN

java.lang.Object
cz.cuni.mff.java.ModelBase
cz.cuni.mff.java.SimpleNN
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SimpleNN extends ModelBase implements Serializable
A basic feedforward neural network that supports backpropagation, batch training, several hidden layers, and recording evaluation metrics.

Model serialisation, accuracy/precision/recall reporting, and the ability to visualise ROC score history are all supported by this class.

See Also:

    static class 
    SimpleNN.EvaluationResult
    A simple container for evaluation results including loss, accuracy, precision, and recall.

  • Method Details

    • initializeWeights

      protected void initializeWeights()
      Specified by:
      initializeWeights in class ModelBase

    • forward

      public double[][] forward(double[][] inputs)
      Performs a forward pass on a batch of input vectors.
      Specified by:
      forward in class ModelBase
      Parameters:
      inputs - 2D array of input samples (shape: batchSize × inputSize)
      Returns:
      network output for each input (softmax scores)

    • train

      public void train(double[][] trainData, int[] trainTargets, double[][] testData, int[] testTargets, int epochs, int batchSize) throws IOException
      Trains the network using mini-batch stochastic gradient descent.
      Specified by:
      train in class ModelBase
      Parameters:
      trainData - input samples for training
      trainTargets - corresponding class labels
      testData - input samples for validation/testing
      testTargets - corresponding class labels for validation
      epochs - number of training epochs
      batchSize - size of each mini-batch
      Throws:
      IOException - if metric logging fails

    • saveModel

      public void saveModel(String filePath) throws IOException
      Saves the current model state to a file using Java serialization.
      Specified by:
      saveModel in class ModelBase
      Parameters:
      filePath - destination file path
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing fails

    • loadModel

      public void loadModel(String filePath) throws IOException
      Loads the model state from a file and replaces all internal parameters.
      Specified by:
      loadModel in class ModelBase
      Parameters:
      filePath - source file path
      Throws:
      IOException - if deserialization fails

    • evaluate

      public SimpleNN.EvaluationResult evaluate(double[][] data, int[] targets, boolean saveRoc)
      Evaluates the model on the given dataset and computes key classification metrics.
      Parameters:
      data - input features
      targets - true class labels
      saveRoc - whether to record ROC scores for visualization
      Returns:
      an SimpleNN.EvaluationResult containing loss, accuracy, precision, and recall
